name: TANDY LEATHER FACTORY INC
summary: Tandy Leather Factory, Inc. (TLF) is a retailer and wholesale distributor of leather and leather-related products. The company sells leather, leatherworking tools, hardware, kits, and related supplies primarily to hobbyists, crafters, and small businesses. It operates through a network of retail stores and serves customers seeking materials for leather crafting and related creative projects.

products.name: Leather
products.description: Raw leather materials sold to hobbyists, crafters, and small businesses

products.name: Leatherworking Tools
products.description: Tools used for cutting, stamping, and crafting leather products

products.name: Hardware and Kits
products.description: Leather craft kits and hardware accessories for leatherworking projects
